era_context: Middle Bronze Age II. The Hyksos period in Egypt is well established. Mesopotamia is in the late Old Babylonian period, with the state fragmenting. The Indus Valley Civilization is in its late urban phase or in decline. Shang dynasty is consolidating control in China.

events.title: No specific events confirmed for this year
events.description: No events of documented historical significance have been identified for 1940 BCE.

sources.name: Historiographic consensus on Middle Bronze Age chronology

disconfirming_evidence: No disconfirming evidence identified for events listed (none listed).
historiographic_note: 1940 BCE falls within a period of minimal documentation. The historical record for the mid-2nd millennium BCE is sparse and relies heavily on later compilations and archaeological inference rather than contemporary written sources.
